ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "tmdb_id" INTEGER /* TMDB ID of the film */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "year_released" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "genre_ids" TEXT /* List of genres associated with the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company of the film */,
  "production_country" TEXT /* Production country of the film */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the film */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the film */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview of the film */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* Poster path of the film */,
  "backdrop_path" TEXT /* Backdrop path of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film associated with the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Actor) */,
  "nominee" TEXT /* Name of the nominee */,
  "won" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the nominee won the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Oscar, Golden Globe) */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date the nomination was announced */,
  "winner_date" TEXT /* Date the winner was announced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "cast_order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the film's credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the crew member is associated with */,
  "crew_member_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member (e.g., director, producer) */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member (e.g., directing, production) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the producer is associated with */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the producer */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job of the producer (e.g., executive producer, line producer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_producers_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screenwriters" (
  "screenwriter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screenwriter */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the screenwriter is associated with */,
  "screenwriter_name" TEXT /* Name of the screenwriter */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job of the screenwriter (e.g., writer, adapter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screenwriter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screenwriters_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the box office data is associated with */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "opening_weekend" INTEGER /* Opening weekend revenue of the film */,
  "open_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date the film opened in theaters */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the film closed in theaters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the rating is associated with */,
  "tmdb_vote_average" REAL /* TMDB vote average */,
  "tmdb_vote_count" INTEGER /* TMDB vote count */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the film's ratings page */,
  "imdb_rating" REAL /* IMDB rating of the film */,
  "imdb_votes" INTEGER /* Number of IMDB user reviews */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_id" TEXT /* Rotten Tomatoes ID of the film's ratings page */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_rating" REAL /* Rotten Tomatoes rating of the film */,
  "rotten_tomatoes_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of Rotten Tomatoes reviews */,
  "metacritic_id" TEXT /* Metacritic ID of the film's ratings page */,
  "metacritic_rating" REAL /* Metacritic rating of the film */,
  "metacritic_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of Metacritic reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the review is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film the document is associated with */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., screenplay, production notes) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_documents_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
